name: Chinney Alliance Group Limited
summary: Chinney Alliance Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of plastic and chemical products, and building related contracting activities. It operates through five segments: Plastic and Chemical Products, Building Related Contracting Services, Building Construction, Foundation Piling and Ground Investigation, and Others. The company offers building related contracting services, including engineering contracting services in the air-conditioning industry and maintenance services; superstructure construction work services; and foundation piling, and drilling and site investigation services. It is also involved in contracting of building aluminum works; the distribution and installation of aviation systems and other hi-tech products, as well as mechanical, electrical, and building supplies; trading of electrical, air-conditioning, and other building supply products; and maintenance of air-conditioning, electrical generators, water pumps, and fire prevention and fighting systems. In addition, the company trades in building decoration materials, generators, and electrical and mechanical engineering materials and equipment; and holds properties and investments. Further, it is involved in the treasury functions; basement construction works; agency trading of industrial products; equipment and machinery leasing; construction material testing; design, installation, repair, and maintenance of electrical and mechanical systems; trading of electrical installation products; provision of management services; and installation of air-conditioning systems. It primarily serves public and private sectors in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Macau, and Singapore. The company is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
